name: Town
description: A modest human settlement on the edge of the wild.

rooms.name: Town Square
rooms.description: A cobblestone square at the heart of the town. A fountain burbles at its center.

rooms.name: North Gate
rooms.description: A heavy iron gate stands open. The road beyond leads into dark forest.

rooms.name: Market
rooms.description: Stalls crowd a narrow street. Vendors hawk bread, tools, and stranger things.
